name: Large DNS TXT Response for Data Transfer
description: Detects unusually large DNS TXT responses that may indicate DNS-based data transfer
query:
// Detect large DNS TXT responses
// Trigger on DNS TXT queries with high response volume
events from dns
where query_type = "TXT"
  and record_type = "TXT"
group by source_ip, query_name
having count(*) > 50
within 300 seconds
